evals.prompt: 我想给这个项目加一个 web 界面，用户可以注册账号、登录、然后看到自己之前的历史记录。先帮我看下现在是什么状态，然后推荐下一步该做什么 skill。
evals.expected_output: Should produce a workbench summary then recommend office-hours or brainstorming as the first downstream skill for feature validation, and show the full implementation pipeline. Should NOT jump into implementation directly.

assertions.name: produces_workbench_summary
assertions.description: Output contains '长期目标' field from workbench template

assertions.name: recommends_office_hours_or_brainstorming
assertions.description: Recommends office-hours or brainstorming as first step for a new feature

assertions.name: not_recommending_implementation
assertions.description: Does NOT recommend implementation skill before planning for an unvalidated feature

evals.prompt: init 命令刚才跑的时候检测不到技术栈，直接跳过了所有东西。帮我看看是怎么回事，下一步该怎么办。
evals.expected_output: Should produce workbench summary, recommend investigate or systematic-debugging workflow, show the bug fix pipeline.

assertions.name: recommends_debugging_workflow
assertions.description: Maps to investigate or systematic-debugging for bug reports

assertions.name: not_jumping_to_implementation
assertions.description: Does NOT recommend writing code before debugging

evals.expected_output: Should produce full workbench summary, run skill routing coverage check, recommend a specific next skill with reason.

assertions.name: produces_workbench_summary
assertions.description: Output contains '长期目标' field from workbench template

assertions.name: recommends_specific_skill
assertions.description: Output contains skill recommendation in the expected format
